title: ReadableStream
excerpt: description: Learn about the ReadableStream API for reading streamed data in Cloudflare Workers. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. A `ReadableStream` is returned by the `readable` property inside [TransformStream](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/runtime-apis/streams/transformstream/). * A Boolean value that indicates if the readable stream is locked to a reader.
